channel.title: Go on Joe Muller's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Go on Joe Muller's Blog

item.title: Golang Cheat Sheet
item.description: Golang Cheat Sheet 1. Basic Syntax Comments // Single-line comment /* Multi-line comment */ Variables and Data Types var x int = 5 y := 10 // Type inference // Basic types var ( a bool = true b int = 10 c float64 = 3.14 d string = "Hello" ) Constants const Pi = 3.14 const ( StatusOK = 200 StatusNotFound = 404 ) Operators // Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %, ++, -- // Comparison: ==, !
